title: [MTR4] WAP7 Locomotive - Indian Railways
description: High-quality WAP-7 locomotive resource pack for Minecraft Transit Railway, featuring detailed .OBJ models and realistic Indian Railways textures.
body:
## ⚡ WAP-7 Locomotive – Train Resource Pack

---

Experience the raw power of Indian Railways’ iconic **WAP-7 electric locomotive** in Minecraft with this high-detail **locomotive resource pack**! Designed for MTR players and Indian Railways fans, this pack brings accuracy, realism, and modern detailing directly into your world.

---

### ✨ Features:

* Highly detailed **WAP-7 exterior model** based on real-world specifications
* Accurate headlights, marker lights, roof equipment, and livery patterns
* Smooth, realistic textures for grills, vents, and locomotive body detailing
* Optimized .OBJ model for high visual quality.
* **Supports dual-direction operation** with proper visibility in both directions
* Perfect for Indian Railways–themed worlds, express services, and custom consist setups

---

### 🚦 Dual / Forwards / Backwards Locomotive Behaviour

This resource pack includes **separate models** for:

* **Dual Locomotive**
* **Forwards Locomotive**
* **Backwards Locomotive**
* **Low rise pantograph locomotive**
* **High rise pantograph locomotive**

Each model behaves differently in-game to match realistic Indian Railways usage.

#### **Dual Locomotive**

* The **Dual** locomotive:

  * Is visible in the **Depot**
  * Remains visible when the train is **moving in either direction**
  * Remains visible when the train is **halted at platforms**

This model is ideal for decorational depot purpose and loco-only or push-pull services.

#### **Forwards Locomotive Model**

* The **Forwards** locomotive:

  * Is visible **only when the train is moving forwards**
  * Remains visible when **halted at platforms** while moving forwards
  * **Does NOT appear in the Depot but still occupies its own space on the siding**

This ensures proper loco change behaviour when direction is reversed at a terminating line/station.

#### **Backwards** locomotive:

* The **Backwards** locomotive works the same as the forwards model, but in reverse:

  * Visible **only when moving backwards**
  * Remains visible when **halted at platforms** while moving backwards
  * **Does NOT appear in the Depot but still occupies its own space on the siding**

This ensures proper loco change behaviour when direction is reversed at a terminating line/station.

---

### ⚠️ Warnings:

This resource pack uses **.OBJ models**, which may cause **lag spikes or stuttering on MTR4**.
These issues come from **how MTR4 currently handles .OBJ models**, and **are completely outside our control**.

Please note:

* We are not responsible for any performance issues caused by MTR4.
* Minor texture alignment issues may still exist — updates are ongoing.
* This locomotive is designed for **Indian Broad Gauge (1676 mm)**.
  Platforms **higher than 1 block** may visually clip with the loco steps or underframe.

For best realism, we recommend using our [Indian Railways Resources](https://modrinth.com/project/id8qqQsh) pack alongside this locomotive.

👉 Please report any bugs or visual glitches in our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/2bGWEmvjvZ) so we can address them in future updates.

---

### 📦 Requirements:

* **[Minecraft Transit Railway (MTR) Mod](https://modrinth.com/project/XKPAmI6u)** – Base Mod
* **[Indian Railways Resources](https://modrinth.com/project/id8qqQsh)** *(optional but recommended)* – ensures accurate alignment of track and items with the locomotive.
---

### 🛠️ Installation:

1. Download the `.zip` file
2. Place it inside `/.minecraft/resourcepacks/`
3. Enable the pack in Minecraft
4. Look for locomotives starting with **“WAP7”** in the Depot list

---

Bring realism, accuracy, and power to your MTR network with the **WAP-7 Locomotive Resource Pack** — built for Indian Railway fans and creators.

**📥 Download now and stay tuned for more Indian rolling stock!**
